Privacy Notice and Data Processing Addendum for NamThinh Bamboo Holdings JSC regarding investor relations and employee banking workflows in Vietnam.
This notice aligns with Decree 13/2023 on personal data protection and the Securities Law, and is intended for interactions with the Ho Chi City Stock Bourse and the VN Securities Council portals.
We process contact details for corporate representatives, role mailboxes (e.g., ir@namthinh-bamboo.vn), and generic employment data that do not, by themselves, identify a specific natural person.
PII is collected only where necessary, and may include weak identifiers such as work location, job title, and device tags, which are assessed in context to avoid identifying an individual when standalone.
For securities disclosure, MNPI is excluded; only public facts already announced on the bourse or regulator portals are used, such as published quarterly timelines and board-resolved policy summaries.
Employee onboarding forms include empty fields: Full name: [ ], Date of Birth (DD/MM/YYYY): [ ], Citizen ID No.: [XXXX-XXXX-XXXX], Tax Code: [XXXXXXXXXX], and Bank Account: [****-****], retained under internal schedules.
A single intentional quasi-identifier cluster may appear in audit logs for risk testing: device tag NT-HN-118, date of birth 02/11/1987, ward Tan Phu, role FX settlement assistant at NamThinh Bamboo Holdings JSC, payroll account suffix 2231 at Mekong Vista Bank, internal user ID UA-77129.
These attributes are stored separately from names and encrypted; they are not combined to create profiles unless required for security verification.
Investor queries are handled via public forums and the company website; no MNPI is disclosed in call notes or FAQs.
Data subjects in Vietnam may submit access requests to dpo@namthinh-bamboo.vn, stating the matter and timeframe; responses exclude trade secrets and provide copies of already-public disclosures.
Transfers to processors in Singapore are limited to payroll and IT support; no securities-sensitive data is exported before a bourse announcement is posted.
Retention: employee device tags and branch logs are kept 24 months; investor event RSVPs are deleted after 30 days; aggregate attendance stats are anonymized.
Banking records used solely to confirm salary payments are masked; account numbers appear only as suffixes and do not identify an individual when considered alone.
Generic demographics are captured for diversity reports (age range in decades, province groupings), without dates or addresses that could help identify a person.
Complaint handling uses ticket references like IR-0000-XYZ, which are invalid identifier forms and do not link to securities accounts.
Any data provided during public investor days is treated as non-sensitive; slides mirror information already current on the VN Securities Council disclosure portal.
